pages.text: If you've ever wished your horse felt more like a trail partner and less like a disposable cart with legs, you're in the right barn. $(thing)Better Horses$() is built for ranchers, scouts, and stubborn adventurers alike.

pages.name: A Good Horse
pages.text: Once a horse is fully tamed, this mod marks it as yours right away. From there you can turn an ordinary mount into a proper road companion.

pages.title: How to Read This Thing
pages.text: Start with $(thing)Claiming a Mount$() if you're fresh off the saddle. After that, the $(thing)Tack Room$() has every recipe in the mod, and $(thing)Trail Notes$() covers the riding comforts that make long trips feel easy.
